name: Fuda Alloy Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Fuda Alloy Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, technical consultation, and service of electrical contact materials. Its products include contact rivets, contact tips, powder metallurgy contact, brazing materials, silver alloy wires, profiles, contact assemblies, and other series. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Wenzhou, China.
